name: FeedDeliveryOrchestrator

neutralConcepts: T81 called UNCONDITIONALLY independent of T76 privacy check result
Privacy settings can change between T76 generation and T78 delivery
Below delivery threshold = DataProcessResult.success({ suppressed: true }) — NOT failure
Delivery threshold from FREEDOM config — not hardcoded

ironRules.rule: T81 PrivacyGatekeeper.check() called UNCONDITIONALLY — independent of T76 result. T78 cannot read feedItem.privacyCheckPassedAtGeneration as a substitute. = BUILD_FAILURE
Below delivery threshold = DataProcessResult.success({ suppressed: true }) — never failure(). Suppression is a valid delivery outcome.

keywords: feed delivery orchestrator T78 two phase privacy independent T81 unconditional FREEDOM threshold
